name: Stromboli
recipeIngredient: 2 Loaves frozen bread dough - thaw, 1 lb each
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk.
2. Punch down the dough and roll the loaves together into one 15x12 inch rectangle.
3. Layer ham and pepperoni on half of the dough lengthwise.
4. Sprinkle onion and green pepper over the ham and pepperoni.
5. Spread 1/4 cup pizza sauce over the vegetables.
6. Layer mozzarella, bologna, salami, and Swiss cheese over the sauce.
7. Sprinkle with dried basil, oregano, garlic powder, and pepper.
8. Spread another 1/4 cup pizza sauce on top of the cheese.
9. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling and seal the edges well.
10. Place the stromboli on a greased baking pan, 15x10x1 inches.
11. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Brush with melted butter before serving.
13. Serve with remaining pizza sauce and sliced stromboli.
